resources.string: Tracks the progress of your top habits
Are you sure you want to reset all data?
This will permanently delete all your habits and progress. This action cannot be undone.
Use manual path if disabled: Settings > Apps > App Management > Display over other apps
Keeps reminders & overlay reliable even when the app is closed
Required so the system doesn\'t kill reminders
It may be delayed the first time only
No Text-to-Speech engine is installed. Voice reminders require Google Speech Services. Please install it from Google Play.
Google Play Services are unavailable on this device. Text To Speech cannot be installed automatically.
Tap to quickly configure background permissions and prevent missing habit alerts.
%1$d days left to reach your goal
%1$d completions left to reach your goal
Are you sure you want to permanently delete this habit and all its logged history? This action cannot be undone.
This habit isn\'t scheduled for today
What\'s your motivation for this habit?
Target completions must be greater than 0
You already have %1$d active habits (the maximum) — deactivate one first
Activate immediately to begin tracking. Active habits: %1$d / %2$d
Add at least one reminder time
This time has already been added.
This time is too close to habit \'%1$s\' at %2$s. Needs at least 10 minutes gap.
Time %1$s is too close to habit \'%2$s\' at %3$s. Needs at least 10 minutes gap.
Wipe all profile and habit details
You can\'t have more than 6 active habits at the same time. Please complete or delete one of your active habits first.
Enable border glow, animations, and reflections on cards
Control the frosted glass background blur (Auto: recommended)
Name must be at least 2 characters
Hide the Android bottom navigation bar (swipe to reveal)
You already have 6 active habits. Choose one to deactivate to activate this one:
Habit saved, but limit of 6 active habits reached. Complete or delete one first.
Are you sure you want to delete all notification history? This cannot be undone.

string-array.name: motivational_quotes
string-array.item: Small daily improvements over time lead to stunning results.
Your habits will determine your future.
We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
Motivation is what gets you started. Habit is what keeps you going.
It is easier to prevent bad habits than to break them.
Consistency is the key to all success.
Small steps in the right direction can turn out to be the biggest steps of your life.
Discipline is doing what needs to be done, even if you don\'t want to do it.
Don\'t stop until you\'re proud.
Focus on being productive instead of busy.
The secret of your future is hidden in your daily routine.
Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
You don\'t have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
Action is the foundational key to all success.
Your life does not get better by chance, it gets better by change.
Everything you’ve ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
It always seems impossible until it’s done.
Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
The future depends on what you do today.
Believe you can and you\'re halfway there.
Quality is not an act, it is a habit.
The first step is always the hardest. Keep moving.
A year from now you may wish you had started today.
Make each day your masterpiece.
Persistence guarantees that results are inevitable.
Dream big. Start small. But most of all, start.
Little by little, a little becomes a lot.
The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
Productivity is never an accident.
Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
Your only limit is you.
Great things never come from comfort zones.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
Work hard in silence, let your success be your noise.
The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
If you want to live a happy life, tie it to a goal.
Energy and persistence conquer all things.
Hard work beats talent when talent doesn’t work hard.
Winning is a habit. Unfortunately, so is losing.
I attribute my success to this: I never gave or took any excuse.
The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus.
Motivation is a fire from within.
Procrastination is the thief of time.
You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
Change your habits, change your life.
If you are going through hell, keep going.
It’s not whether you get knocked down, it’s whether you get up.
Failure will never overtake me if my determination to succeed is strong enough.
The only place where success comes before work is in the dictionary.
Everything comes to him who hustles while he waits.
Invest in your habits, they pay the best interest.
Setting goals is the first step in turning the invisible into the visible.
Don’t let yesterday take up too much of today.
You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
I’ve failed over and over and over again in my life and that is why I succeed.
The most difficult thing is the decision to act, the rest is merely tenacity.
Definiteness of purpose is the starting point of all achievement.
Build your own dreams, or someone else will hire you to build theirs.
Either you run the day, or the day runs you.
I am not a product of my circumstances. I am a product of my decisions.
Every strike brings me closer to the next home run.
Life is what happens to you while you\'re busy making other plans.
We become what we think about.
The mind is everything. What you think you become.
An unexamined life is not worth living.
The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
Your time is limited, so don\'t waste it living someone else\'s life.
Winning isn\'t everything, but wanting to win is.
I am grateful for all of those who said NO to me. It’s because of them I’m doing it myself.
If you can dream it, you can do it.
The best revenge is massive success.
Life is short, and it is up to you to make it sweet.
Happiness is not something readymade. It comes from your own actions.
Focus on the journey, not the destination.
The only way to reach the impossible is to believe it is possible.
Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
Don’t be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
All our dreams can come true if we have the courage to pursue them.
Opportunities don\'t happen. You create them.
Try not to become a man of success, but rather try to become a man of value.
Great minds discuss ideas; average minds discuss events; small minds discuss people.
If you love life, don\'t waste time, for time is what life is made up of.
A successful man is one who can lay a firm foundation with the bricks others have thrown at him.
No one can make you feel inferior without your consent.
The distance between insanity and genius is measured only by success.
Knowledge is power. Information is liberating.
The golden rule for every business is this: Put yourself in your customer\'s place.
In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
The goal is not to be better than the other man, but your previous self.
Everything is hard before it is easy.
Don\'t stop when you\'re tired. Stop when you\'re done.
The best way to predict the future is to create it.
Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
Stay hungry, stay foolish.
The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
Life is what happens when you\'re busy making other plans.
Get busy living or get busy dying.
You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
Many of life\'s failures are people who did not realize how close they were to success when they gave up.
If you want to live a happy life, tie it to a goal, not to people or things.
Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.
Money and success don’t change people; they merely amplify what is already there.
Not how long, but how well you have lived is the main thing.
In order to write about life first you must live it.
The big lesson in life, baby, is never be scared of anyone or anything.
Life is not a problem to be solved, but a reality to be experienced.
Turn your wounds into wisdom.
The way I see it, if you want the rainbow, you gotta put up with the rain.
Do all the good you can, for all the people you can, in all the ways you can, as long as you can.
Don’t settle for what life gives you; make life better and build something.
Everything negative - pressure, challenges - is all an opportunity for me to rise.
I like criticism. It makes you strong.
You never really learn much from hearing yourself speak.
Life imposes things on you that you can’t control, but you still have the choice of how you’re going to live through this.
Life is never easy. There is work to be done and obligations to be met.
Live for each second without hesitation.
Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.
Life is a succession of lessons which must be lived to be understood.
My mission in life is not merely to survive, but to thrive.
You get in life what you have the courage to ask for.
Life is a progress, and not a station.
Change is the law of life.
If you change the way you look at things, the things you look at change.
Keep your eyes on the stars, and your feet on the ground.
Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
Two things are infinite: the universe and human stupidity; and I\'m not sure about the universe.
So many books, so little time.
A room without books is like a body without a soul.
Be who you are and say what you feel, because those who mind don\'t matter, and those who matter don\'t mind.
You know you\'re in love when you can\'t fall asleep because reality is finally better than your dreams.
You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
Be the change that you wish to see in the world.
In three words I can sum up everything I\'ve learned about life: it goes on.
If you tell the truth, you don\'t have to remember anything.
A friend is someone who knows all about you and still loves you.
To live is the rarest thing in the world. Most people exist, that is all.
Always forgive your enemies; nothing annoys them so much.
Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
We accept the love we think we deserve.
Without music, life would be a mistake.
I am so clever that sometimes I don\'t understand a single word of what I am saying.
To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
Insanity is doing the same thing, over and over again, but expecting different results.
It is better to be hated for what you are than to be loved for what you are not.
Small habits lead to big changes.
One day at a time, one habit at a time.
Today is the best day to start.
Your future is created by what you do today, not tomorrow.
Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
Focus on progress, not perfection.
A small win is still a win.
Consistency beats intensity.
Make it easy, make it obvious.
Repetition is the mother of all skills.
Success is a few simple disciplines practiced every day.
Failure is the opportunity to begin again more intelligently.
The secret to getting ahead is getting started.
It’s not what we do once in a while that shapes our lives. It’s what we do consistently.
Habits are the compound interest of self-improvement.
Motivation gets you going, but discipline keeps you growing.
You will never change your life until you change something you do daily.
Forget inspiration. Habit is more dependable.
Success is not a destination, it\'s a way of life.
Character is simply habit long continued.
Your daily rituals define you.
Master your morning, master your day.
The chains of habit are too light to be felt until they are too heavy to be broken.
Good habits are as addictive as bad habits, and a lot more rewarding.
Success is the result of preparation, hard work, and learning from failure.
Don\'t wish it were easier, wish you were better.
Discipline is the soul of an army. It makes small numbers formidable.
All success begins with self-discipline.
Without self-discipline, success is impossible, period.
A disciplined mind leads to happiness, and an undisciplined mind leads to suffering.
The cost of discipline is always less than the price of regret.
Self-discipline is when your conscience tells you to do something and you don\'t talk back.
We must all suffer one of two things: the pain of discipline or the pain of regret.
Discipline is the power of being able to do what you know you should do.
The first and best victory is to conquer self.
He who cannot obey himself will be commanded.
Great acts are made up of small deeds.
Step by step and the thing is done.
Small deeds done are better than great deeds planned.
Success is steady progress toward one\'s personal goals.
The secret of success is constancy to purpose.
I am a slow walker, but I never walk back.
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
Victory belongs to the most persevering.
Courage is not having the strength to go on; it is going on when you don\'t have the strength.
Through perseverance, many people win success out of what seemed destined to be certain failure.
The difference between a successful person and others is not a lack of strength, but a lack of will.
Fall seven times, stand up eight.
Perseverance is failing 19 times and succeeding the 20th.
The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
Keep moving forward.
Stay focused, stay determined.
Finish what you started.
Don\'t give up on your dreams.
